_meta.summary: Fifth tuning iteration. Two coupled changes: (1) all three main weapons are always owned + always equipped via L1/R1 hold (nothing held = Vulcan, L1 = Pulse, R1 = Spread); the shop no longer offers buy/equip on main rows. (2) Enemies (everything except Walls + the Boss) roll for a coloured shield at spawn: 20% chance at L1 ramping linearly to 50% at L100. Shield is blue/red/yellow; only the matching main weapon (pulse/spread/vulcan) chips the bubble. Wrong-main bullets ricochet off the shield at a reflected angle and turn hostile — they can hurt the player on the way back. Side weapons (missile/drone) are absorbed silently. Screen-clear + mega-laser abilities bypass shields entirely. Shield HP is flat 250 across all carriers so a few correctly-aimed shots crack it; the shield is a forced-swap mechanic, not a tank. The boss starts unshielded and equips a fresh random-colour shield every 5 seconds it spends naked (so the player has 5s of clean DPS after each crack). Pickup upgrades apply to whichever main is currently being fired (auto-handled by main_type tracking the hold state). Bot updates are PAUSED for this snapshot — see TODO(bot-shields) markers in tuning/bot/session.py + brain.py.
diff_from_previous: Loadout: main_pulse / main_spread / main_vulcan default 1/1/1 (was 1/0/0). Migration in SaveData._parse_profile bumps any zero level to 1 for legacy saves.
Loadout.main_type defaults 'vulcan' (was 'pulse'); Player.update sets it every frame from L1/R1 hold (L1=pulse, R1=spread, none=vulcan).
Controls: new l1_held / r1_held fields polled from JOY_L1 / JOY_R1 + keyboard fallbacks Q / E.
Bullet: new weapon_kind slot ('pulse'/'spread'/'vulcan'/'missile'/'drone') + ricocheted flag. Tagged on _fire_main / _fire_side construction.
Enemy: new shield_color / shield_hp / shield_max / shield_flash_t fields. Shield_hit(dmg) chips the bubble and clears it on break.
_scale_enemy now rolls _enemy_shield_chance(level) and equips a random colour. Skipped on Wall + Boss.
Boss: starts unshielded, _shield_cd ticks down from BOSS_SHIELD_RESPAWN_DELAY (5.0s) — equips a fresh random colour when it hits 0. Same delay restarts after the player cracks one.

Bullet-vs-enemy collision: shield gate runs before e.hit(). Right main weapon = shield_hit + bullet absorbed. Wrong main weapon = _ricochet_bullet (v' = v - 2(v·n)n, friendly flips to False). Sides + untyped = absorbed silently.
_ricochet_bullet preserves damage so a returning bullet hurts the player by the same amount it would have hurt the enemy.
HUD: _draw_main_swap_hints overlays bottom-left ('L1' + pulse glyph) and bottom-right ('R1' + spread glyph) on the playfield, brightening whichever weapon the player is currently holding.

Shop: main rows can no longer 'buy' or 'equip'. _row_action returns only 'upgrade' / 'max' / 'locked' for mains; _buy strips the lvl==0 + wrong-type branches; EQ tag removed from main rows; _detail_pieces shows '(hold L1 / R1 / no hold)' next to the level number instead of the equip status.

Bot pause markers: TODO(bot-shields) added to tuning/bot/session.py module docstring + tuning/bot/brain.py module docstring. Bot still picks a single main_type per upgrade window and never holds L1/R1, so every shielded enemy ricochets bullets back — sim runs against snapshot 06 are NOT comparable to baselines until the brain is taught to set l1_held / r1_held based on the most-threatening shielded target.
_meta.next_snapshot: Bump to 07-<short-slug>.json. Likely targets: (a) teach the bot to swap weapons against shielded targets, then re-run sim baselines; (b) tune shield_hp / spawn rate after watching live play; (c) decide whether obstacles (asteroid/mine/crystal/pylon) should also roll for shields or stay clean.
top_level_levers: BOSS_SHIELD_RESPAWN_DELAY (5.0s of naked DPS window per shield cycle)
Ricochet damage equals original bullet damage (no reduction on bounce)
Which projectile classes bypass shields (currently screen_clear + mega_laser + every non-bullet path)
Which enemy classes are eligible for shields (currently all except Wall + Boss; Boss has its own timed cycle)
Main-weapon hold mapping (Pulse=L1, Spread=R1, Vulcan=none) — bindings are arbitrary, picked to leave Vulcan default + the two outer weapons on the shoulders
Color-to-weapon mapping (blue=pulse, red=spread, yellow=vulcan) — chosen to mirror bullet glyph colours
All snapshot-05 levers carried forward: enemy_hp, fire_rate, bullets_per_shot, level duration, wave count, drop chance, upgrade costs, etc.

_schema.purpose: Self-contained baseline of every numeric lever that affects gameplay difficulty and feel. One snapshot = one point in time we can A/B against.

conventions.fire_rate_sec: seconds between shots (lower = faster). Reciprocal is shots/sec.
conventions.damage_per_bullet: raw damage applied per projectile hit; player i-frames apply between hits.
conventions.speed_px_per_sec: scalar OR [min, max] when randomized at spawn.
conventions.levels: array length defines max level for that thing. Add/remove entries freely — index = level - 1.
conventions._notes: free-form comment field. Ignore for diffing semantics.

enemy_shields._design: Forced weapon-swap mechanic. Not a tank — HP is low enough that a few right-weapon hits crack it. Wrong-weapon main bullets ricochet at a reflected angle and become hostile. Side weapons / abilities can't damage but bypass via screen_clear / mega_laser; missile + drone are silently absorbed.
enemy_shields.eligible_enemies: all except Wall and Boss (Boss runs its own timed cycle)

boss._notes: After the boss cracks, the respawn timer resets to 5s. The Player has a 5s clean-DPS window each cycle to chunk HP.

interactions.right_main_weapon: shield_hit(damage) — chips the bubble by bullet damage. Bullet absorbed. Shield breaks at HP <= 0.
interactions.wrong_main_weapon: ricochet via v' = v - 2(v·n)n, normal computed from shield center to bullet impact point. Bullet becomes hostile (friendly=False) and keeps its damage value, so a return-hit on the player hurts the same as a forward-hit on the enemy would.
interactions.screen_clear_ability: bypasses — applies e.hp -= 400 directly, doesn't go through bullet collision.
interactions.mega_laser_ability: bypasses — applies e.hit(dmg) directly each frame.
interactions.enemy_contact_damage: shields do NOT block body contact; the player loses HP normally on a shielded enemy ramming them.

player_input._design: All three main weapons are always equipped. Held shoulder picks which one fires; releasing returns to Vulcan. Side weapon + ability + bomb are unchanged (still selected in the shop).

main_weapon_hold._notes: Switch is instant; cooldown_main is shared across mains so a swap doesn't reset cooldown.

player_input.pickup_main_behavior: applies to whichever main is currently being fired (main_type tracks hold state).

shop_changes.main_rows: no buy/equip — only upgrade or MAX/LOCKED. EQ tag removed. Detail strip shows '(hold L1 / R1 / no hold)' as the equip hint.
shop_changes.shield_row: unchanged (refers to PLAYER shield, not enemy shields).

carry_forward: Every lever in 05-tier-unlocks.json is unchanged: player shield HP/regen, engine speeds, enemy HP/score/credits, fire rates, level scaling, sector composition, tier-unlock cascade, upgrade costs, ability cooldowns. See 05-tier-unlocks.json for the full baseline.
